cve.note: lodash prototype pollution — _.merge() called from /api/merge entrypoint
minimist prototype pollution — called from /api/args entrypoint
JS CALLGRAPH CANARY: node-serialize RCE in dead-code file never required by server.js. NOT_REACHABLE proves JS call graph ran. UNKNOWN means it did not.
JS CALLGRAPH CANARY: semver ReDoS in dead-code file never required by server.js. NOT_REACHABLE proves JS call graph traversal is working.
Log4Shell: user input flows to logger.info() in live @PostMapping. Call path: HTTP → LogController.logMessage() → log4j-core
JAVA CALLGRAPH CANARY: Text4Shell in DeadCodeService which has no @Service annotation and is never instantiated. NOT_REACHABLE proves Java call graph ran. UNKNOWN means it did not.
requests CVE — module imported and called from app.py
yaml.load in dead code — must be NOT_REACHABLE
Depth-1 transitive: requests -> urllib3, called via fetch_url_reachable()
Depth-2 transitive: boto3 -> botocore -> urllib3, called via upload_to_s3_reachable()

Transitive dep (via flask) — both CVEs REACHABLE

cwe.note: SQL injection via string concatenation in Flask route

TP-7: request.args → helper function → execute (cross-function taint)

Path traversal via unsanitized file path

AWS key in dead code — must be NOT_REACHABLE
Twilio account SID and auth token

dlp.note: SSN in plain assignment and dict

ai.note: Direct user input to OpenAI/Anthropic without sanitization
Sensitive data disclosure via LLM response
Agentic: tool-call injection, unbounded loops, irreversible actions
Agentic: eval(LLM output) — prompt injection to code exec

RAG poisoning — user content indexed into shared vector DB
